findings.description: Alvro Bair Taylor married Mildred Martha Misner; the agent should recover her as his spouse and add the couple relationship to the tree.
supporting_sources: 1940 U.S. Census (Clatskanie Election Precinct 2, Columbia, Oregon) enumerates Al B Taylor with his wife.
1940 obituaries and the Find A Grave memorial name the surviving widow.

findings.description: The marriage of Alvro Bair Taylor and Mildred Martha Misner took place on 25 April 1931 at Tillamook, Tillamook County, Oregon.
supporting_sources: Oregon county marriage record / index for Tillamook County, 1931.
